name: RAG Q&A Pipeline
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline with query rewriting and relevance check

nodes.label: Query Rewriter
nodes.notes: Expand query into 3 search variants for better retrieval coverage

nodes.label: Vector Search
nodes.notes: Search Qdrant collection with all 3 query variants, top-10 each

nodes.label: Relevance Judge
nodes.notes: Filter retrieved chunks — keep only score > 0.75

nodes.label: Has Context?
nodes.notes: Yes if ≥1 chunk passes relevance. No if all filtered out.

nodes.label: Answer Generator
nodes.notes: Generate answer grounded in retrieved context. Cite sources.

nodes.label: Fallback Reply
nodes.notes: Graceful fallback: 'I don't have enough information to answer that.'
